-  kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeAWDL 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeAWDL

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeAWDL: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsIncludeAWDL#Discussion)

Include AWDL interface when [`kDNSServiceInterfaceIndexAny`](/documentation/dnssd/kdnsserviceinterfaceindexany) is specified.
